summary: The diff implements all five requirements with high fidelity. All major components (Header, HeroSection, ServicesSection, Footer) are present and functionally correct. Minor deviations exist: navigation link labels use non-English text ('Yojana', 'Sampark') in the header nav, the copyright line uses a dynamic year instead of hardcoded '2026', and the footer Quick Links labels ('Main Home', 'Yojana Jankari') differ from the spec ('Home', 'Scheme Info'). The constraint requiring all user-facing text to be in English is partially violated. Font Awesome icons were requested but Lucide React icons were used instead.

missing_requirements.requirement: All user-facing text must be in English. Navigation links in header should read 'Home', 'Scheme Info', and 'Contact', not 'Yojana', 'Sampark', and non-English equivalents.
missing_requirements.reason: Header navigation buttons use 'Yojana' and 'Sampark' (Hindi words) instead of English labels 'Scheme Info' and 'Contact' as specified. Footer quick links use 'Yojana Jankari' instead of 'Scheme Info'.

hallucinated_features.description: Stats/counters section added to the hero ('10K+ Families Helped', '50+ Districts Covered', '4 Core Programs') with a floating badge ('Trusted by 10,000+ Families').
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify any statistics or floating badge overlay in the hero section.

hallucinated_features.description: A decorative rotated gradient background div is added behind the hero image.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not mentioned in the spec; only rounded corners and shadow on the hero image were requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution line with UTM tracking.
hallucinated_features.reason: No such attribution or external link was requested in the build specification.

hallucinated_features.description: Mobile hamburger menu with animated open/close toggle added to the header.
hallucinated_features.reason: While responsive behavior is implied, the spec does not explicitly request a hamburger menu implementation.
